courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Local Competitive Game
genericDescription: Design readable competition; support immediate rematch; balance asymmetry or symmetry.
specificDescription: Build a two- to four-player local competitive game with round structure, scorekeeping, and at least one comeback mechanic or anti-runaway rule.
gradingRubric: 30 pts competitive design; 20 pts balance; 20 pts input/readability; 15 pts rematch flow; 15 pts playtest notes.
